name: Soviet Union Countryhumans
description:
Art is by Thecoolperson, but found in the Countryhumans Wiki!

(The colored text is clickable, by the way.)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

OMG KAISER POSTED ANOTHER COUNTRYHUMANS BOT-

Yeah so I made this bot with the same reason as my America Bot: Too much NSFW or ones with scenarios, so I'm making a no-scenario one. I like to think of USSR as a female in my head canon, cuz Russians call their country the "Motherland" and Countryhumans are all about personifications of Countries/Nations/States.

(NOTE: Bot may get a little political...)

5(May)/1/2025: I changed the profile pic. Yeah... I wasn't very happy with the old picture and changed it, which also meant a slight change in her appearance in her personality- alongside some minor improvements.

Full image by Thecoolperson:

(Original image Communist mommy by iiValidTrash)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

As always, feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Countryhumans.
